title: The International Finance Corporation (Status, Immunities and Privileges) Act, 1958
full_text: The International Finance Corporation (Status, Immunities and Privileges) Act, 1958 अन्‍तरराष्‍ट्रीय वित्त निगम (प्रास्‍थिति, उन्‍मुक्‍ति और विशेषाधिकार) अधिनियम, 1958 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 195842 Act Number: 42 Enactment Date: 1958-10-17 Act Year: 1958 Short Title: The International Finance Corporation (Status, Immunities and Privileges) Act, 1958 Hindi Title: अन्‍तरराष्‍ट्रीय वित्त निगम (प्रास्‍थिति, उन्‍मुक्‍ति और विशेषाधिकार) अधिनियम, 1958 Long Title: An Act to implement the international agreement for the establishment and operation of the International Finance Corporation in so far as it relates to the status, immunities and privileges of that Corporation, and for matters connected therewith. Ministry: Ministry of Finance Department: Department of Economic Affairs Enforcement Date: 17-10-1958 Schedule 1. THE SCHEDULE Order Appendix Forms TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles The International Finance Corporation (Status, Immunities and Privileges) Act, 1958 Show all section Section 1. Short title and extent. Section 2. Definitions. Section 3. Conferment of status and certain immunities and privileges on the Corporation and conferment of certain immunities and privileges on its officers and employees. Section 4. Power to make rules.
